creator: tom@eborcom.com
text:
This PR supercedes ports/9572, which should now be closed. The patch
below should be applied to the version currently in the ports tree.

I have changed the MAINTAINER to myself, with the consent of the
previous maintainer.

No files have been added. The following files have been removed:
patches/patch-ab
patches/patch-ac
patches/patch-af
patches/patch-ag
patches/patch-ah
